commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Behold, the very things occur which were spoken; and since those occur which were foretold before, whatever things were promised will also follow; as the Lord Himself promises, saying, "But when ye see all these things come to pass, know ye that the kingdom of God is at hand."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content:
"So likewise ye, when ye shall see these things come to pass, know ye that the kingdom of God is nigh at hand.".
"So likewise ye "(He adds), "when ye shall see all these things come to pass, know ye that the kingdom of heaven is nigh at hand."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
